meaning: adj.反驳的,反对的,抗辩的n.矛盾因素,对立物
examples: The advice I received was often contradictory.
We are faced with two apparently contradictory statements.
Customs officials have made a series of contradictory statements about the equipment.
Still, at this trial Allen has been a reluctant witness, giving sometimes contradictory testimony.
But if anyone can handle the contradictory impulses and requirements, it is the architect Robert A.M.
